compliance_requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, AI, or related field
Based in Ara Damansara, Petaling Jaya or willing to work onsite

must_have.requirement: End-to-end development of production Generative AI or RAG systems
evidence_signals: Shipped a complete GenAI or RAG system to production with full ownership
Can describe the full stack from data ingestion to UI and monitoring
Demonstrates understanding of the end-to-end delivery lifecycle
negative_signals: Only notebook or demo work, no production deployment or operational responsibility
Relies on pre-built solutions without understanding the internals

must_have.requirement: Strong Python development for AI pipelines, backend services, and automation
evidence_signals: Shipped Python backend or ETL/AI pipeline code to production with ownership
Good coding practices: typing/pydantic, async where appropriate, logging, retries
Built automation scripts or scheduled jobs with reliability controls
negative_signals: Only basic scripting or notebook usage, no production deployment
Cannot describe error handling or data consistency practices

must_have.requirement: Frontend development with React.js for dashboards and data-driven UI
evidence_signals: Built React dashboards with complex data tables, filters, and state management
Understands UX for search, sorting, pagination, and information density
Can integrate frontend with REST APIs and handle loading/error states
negative_signals: Only static UI work without real data flow or product usage
Cannot explain component architecture or state management approach

must_have.requirement: FastAPI backend development with REST API design and data management
evidence_signals: Designed FastAPI endpoints with pydantic models and OpenAPI documentation
Handles auth patterns, pagination, validation, and structured error responses
Has implemented report generation or export flows (PDF/HTML/JSON)
negative_signals: API experience limited to simple CRUD without validation or versioning
No understanding of async vs sync, dependency injection, or schema design

must_have.requirement: Hands-on RAG expertise including chunking, embeddings, vector search, and grounding
evidence_signals: Has shipped a RAG system with clear retrieval strategy and grounding behavior
Can explain chunking choices (size/overlap), evaluation, and failure modes (hallucination)
Demonstrates understanding of reranking and hybrid retrieval to improve relevance
negative_signals: Uses the term 'RAG' but cannot describe chunking, retrieval, or grounding details
Only keyword search or prompt-only chatbot experience

must_have.requirement: Database architecture using PostgreSQL, Supabase, and pgvector for hybrid search
evidence_signals: Has modeled Postgres schemas with indexes and migrations for production workloads
Implemented pgvector similarity queries combined with filters for hybrid search
Understands performance considerations: indexing choices, top-k queries, query tuning
negative_signals: No SQL or schema design experience; relies entirely on ORM defaults
Mentions pgvector but cannot explain how vectors are stored or queried

must_have.requirement: Integration with LLM APIs (Claude, OpenAI) and external systems
evidence_signals: Implemented LLM API calls with retries, timeouts, and backoff for rate limits
Uses structured prompts/outputs and can describe prompt iteration and evaluation
Can explain token/cost monitoring and latency optimizations
negative_signals: Only used ChatGPT UI; no API integration experience
No awareness of rate limiting, token budgeting, or safety practices

must_have.requirement: DevOps fundamentals including Git, testing, cron jobs, and cloud deployment
evidence_signals: Deployed services to a cloud platform with environment config and secrets handling
Uses Git with PR-based workflow and code reviews
Understands logs/metrics basics and rollback/incident hygiene
negative_signals: No deployment experience beyond local development
Poor Git hygiene (no branching strategy, no PRs)

nice_to_have.skill: LangChain or LlamaIndex for advanced RAG and knowledge systems
CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment
AI agent frameworks or Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Experience integrating ATS platforms and email delivery systems

rating_scale.3: Strong; shipped in production with clear ownership
rating_scale.4: Expert; repeatable success, can mentor and set standards

bias_guardrails: Ignore protected attributes and non-job-relevant personal information.
Evaluate on demonstrated outcomes: shipped features, measurable improvements, reliability learnings.
Accept equivalent experience from open-source, freelance, internships, or non-traditional paths if production-like.
